description_long: This is a visually striking muffin with a golden-brown baked base encased in a dark brown wrapper featuring the Starbucks Coffee logo prominently on the front. The muffin is generously topped with a thick, swirled layer of white frosting, which is smooth and glossy in appearance. A large, green straw is inserted at an angle into the frosting, adding a playful and distinctive touch reminiscent of Starbucks beverages. The wrapper is ribbed and fits snugly around the muffin, with the logo providing a clear brand association. The frosting is piped in a spiral pattern, culminating in a small peak at the top. There are no visible toppings or decorative elements aside from the straw and the frosting.
description: A golden-brown muffin in a ribbed, dark brown Starbucks-branded wrapper, topped with thick, swirled white frosting and a green straw.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Starbucks Coffee logo on the dark brown wrapper, with the white swirled frosting and green straw clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view with the logo partially visible, highlighting the thick swirl of frosting and the green straw inserted at an angle.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible logo, focusing on the smooth, spiraled frosting and the green straw protruding from the top.
description_view_3: Side view with the logo barely visible, emphasizing the ribbed wrapper and the height of the frosting swirl.
attribute_wrapper_pattern: dark brown with Starbucks Coffee logo
